title: lithocardium fresenii
intro: Lithocardium fresenii, also known as Digitalis purpurea, is a plant species belonging to the foxglove family (Scrophulariaceae) that contains cardiac glycosides, which are used to treat heart conditions. The medicinal properties of Lithocardium fresenii include its ability to increase the force of cardiac contractions and slow heart rate, making it a popular treatment for conditions such as atrial fibrillation and congestive heart failure. The health benefits of Lithocardium fresenii include improved circulation, reduced blood pressure, and increased cardiac output, making it a valuable treatment for various cardiovascular diseases. In herbal preparations, Lithocardium fresenii is often used in the form of dried leaf extract, which can be consumed as a tea or used in pharmaceutical formulations.
